title: Sampling for qEXT and MPN assays: Large-scale One-step Phage Infection of Cyanobacteria
author: Sarah Giuliani
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.fi3bkgn

steps.instruction: Stack filter plate onto bottom 96-well plate without touching the bottom of the sterile filter plate. Plate-Setup Template: a
Transfer 250 uL of sample from each experiment bottle into the filter plate in duplicates. Only sample from the bottles containing test phage and not the controls.
Centrifuge at 1000 x g for 3 min.
Between sampling, store stacked filter/filtrate plates at 4°C, covered with a plate lid.
After filling the plate, remove the filter plate and store the filtrate plate at 4°C, covered with a plate lid and wrapped well with parafilm.
